title: Signed notice to vary Leveson Inquiry Restriction Orders- March 2025
body: "This document is a notice to vary the restriction orders dated 2 December 2011 and 29 November 2012 issued by Sir Brian Leveson during the Leveson Inquiry into the culture, practices and ethics of the press, signed by the Secretary of State for Culture, Media and Sport, the Rt Hon Lisa Nandy MP, and the Secretary of State for the Home Department, the Rt Hon Yvette Cooper MP. "
